title: minAmountOut divides basis points by 100 instead of 10000 — slippage guard over-deducts, accepting catastrophic fills

provenance.note: The bps-vs-percent divisor mixup (100 vs 10000) has no static shape — both versions type-check and run. Only golden I/O reveals that the guard deducts 100x too much, dropping minAmountOut far below the real floor so the swap fills at any price.
